nasb.text: Though while he lives he congratulates himself— And though men praise you when you do well for yourself—

esv.text: For though, while he lives, he counts himself blessed —and though you get praise when you do well for yourself—

cnv.text: 他在世的時候，雖然自稱是有福的，並且說： “只要你豐足，人就稱讚你。”

ccb.text: 他们活着时自以为有福， 人们都赞扬他们的成就，

csbs.text: 虽然人活着的时候自夸为有福，说： “只要你做得好，人们就会称赞你”，
